profile.quote: Changing the world one line of code at a time

home.text: I build modern digital experiences focused on performance, clean design, and scalable code.

about.title: Acerca de Mí
about.text1: ¡👋🏻 Hola! Soy Camilo Castellanos, Desarrollador Full Stackapasionado por la creación de soluciones digitales con impacto.
about.text2: Me especializo en construir interfaces modernas en el frontend y soluciones robustas en el backend, enfocándome en crear aplicaciones escalables, eficientes y alineadas con las necesidades del negocio.
about.text3: Cuando no estoy escribiendo código, me encontrarás:
about.listActivities:
• 🐾 Taking care of my pets (Skay, Lilo, Appa y Maracuyá)
  • 🎮 Playing video games (Up for a match?)
  • 🃏 Board games (Catan never fails)
  • 🌱 Constantly learning (whether it's new tech, languages, or board game rules)
about.frontend: Development of modern, responsive interfaces focused on user experience.
about.backend: I build robust, secure, and scalable APIs to support modern applications.
about.quote: “Behind every line of code lies an opportunity to solve real-world problems.”
